reviews.review_description: Loved this! Please add a ChubbierSnail reference to the game 🥹🙏. Also I have no friends.

This game is really cool the only problem is the little dynamite guys they are so strong and don't leave you alone i really liked my big tower in the sky and the chicken looked so goofy i think this is a really good animal company fan game and i also think it's cool that chubby played  the game toi think it would be really cool if they added some cosmetics i didn't explore much cuz pubs don't work but overall it's a really good game play a so much fun and i just wish there was more people most animal company fan games i don't like but this one was pretty good i also like oh the selling  machine actually works i didn't play the games too much but  it was pretty good for the time i played i hope some more people hop on the game it's a pretty good game absolute cinema 🖐️😮🤚

i was on my own business and all i said was news updates is this is a little bad update but it's okay in the mods would like hell no let's ban this guy guess what it ban me for 3 days and when  i got back on  the mods recognize me and ban me again

developer_response.body: Please file a ban appeal, also I just checked you ban status and it says there are no active bans, and no inactive bans, meaning that you  have never been banned, are you sure you weren't just kicked?

reviews.review_description: Hello, I am Swipeezz, and I would say that this game is really good, I usually play it after playing another game, so I am starting to like this game a ton cause it feels really fresh, I don’t have much to say other than keep making good updates and I appreciate this game.

reviews.review_title: At first, it wouldn’t let me play but no
reviews.review_description: I’m sorry for saying you’re scamming little kids. I’m just like nine or eight years old but at first it wouldn’t let me in so I thought you were scammed the kids but yeah, so sorry for saying that please I hope you can forgive me.

developer_response.body: You're fine, thank you for taking the time to read the response, a lot of people don't

reviews.review_description: Sorry for all the haters especially that one dude who called you a suck-up for putting snail in the game which i think was a completely fair decision, this game is definitely worth all the attention that its getting right now keep up the good work, also i have been doing some 3D design's  nothing to brag about, meta wont let me put a link to show you though...

lol, The mods are actually very nice and only ban you for an Understandable reason.
and many people don't understand how hard it is to develop a good game and moderate it. 
so float if you see this review just keep doing what your doing!
and to the mods goodluck too!

game sucks and the owner will kick u just for waving at him. also the game is super buggy and it's overall just horrible. Plus the models aren't even good and all the items are barely functionable and the good reviews are likely just glazing the game because chubbier snail played it.
Yall I got this for the first time played it for a vid me and my friend are obsessed with this game like chubby snail said ￼ y’all should 100% add a hidden headphones that say board man 100%

reviews.review_title: Ts best game ever but PLEASE:
reviews.review_description:
ADD COSMETICS! 
ADD MORE ITEMS! 
ADD GLUE! (or something idk)
ADD COMPUTER! 
That's all, float, thanks for this game. This is best AC copy ever, and updates going so fast!

i was just scrolling looking for a random game just got this game i started playing and i said i was in a room that immediately said in room not connected so i literally just press pub i said i was in for one second too then immediately said i was not so maybe if you could fix this bug it would be really nice to play i'm getting it three stars cuz i like the og vibe

developer_response.body: Hi, Sorry you couldnt connect, that happens when too many items are spawned into a room, you can always try to play in a private, or if the game puts you into a public by yourself, just wait there and people will join eventually

reviews.review_description: I was joking around how I was gonna mod the game but then Floaatt himself banned me, at least tell me how long im banned for and none of the rules said "no modding"

developer_response.body:
Hi, I can unban you since it was just a joke but also modding/cheating is something you can be reported for through the meta reporting system so technically it is in the rules.

Edit: You are unbanned now, sorry for the mistake

reviews.review_description: Chubbier snail is everywhere    (Devs are dih riders) obvious clone of animal company, and i was Banned over a joke, do not play this slop.

developer_response.body: Hey, i dont know if you know this but I don't ban everyone, if you have a problem with your ban file a ban appeal also I added the snails because he asked, and finally a clone of AC would be if I stole the whole game 1 to 1, I made this from scratch with the intention of making it as a fan game

reviews.review_description: I was playing for the first time i joined a code then a mod joined and said their a mod and that's the first person i met so why would i believe them then i said no your not then they banned me

developer_response.body: Hi, I just checked your account and you don't have ANY bans, not even any that are inactive.

reviews.review_title: I was ban for no reason
reviews.review_description: I was playing than i was ban

developer_response.body: File a ban appeal, btw I don't think that you getting freaky with a corpse should result in a one star review.

reviews.review_description: I love how this game includes a camera, it made it incredibly easier to record.
got banned for making one dead body i dont recomend this game it also really glitchy and you dont die if the chiken explodes the landmine

developer_response.body: Hi, I just checked playfab and you don't have ANY bans. Are you sure that you weren't just kicked? Also you only gave an example of ONE bug which isn't even a bug, the "bug" you are referring to is caused by the chicken damaging you, which gives you immunity for a small amount of time, and then the chicken blows up the landmines, but because you are immune still, you don't die
